overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The scene transitions from an open commercial corridor with Japanese-inspired signage into a darker, enclosed space beneath an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with neon restaurant signage

events.description: white sedan with headlights on drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cyberpunk street observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street past the camera position

entered.detail: building with large red neon signage reading 'Fuyutsuki' in English and Japanese characters
large blue neon sign with 'HO' visible high above the street
multi-story building facade with various illuminated advertisements and windows
elevated highway structure visible in the distance spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night, walking past the prominently lit Fuyutsuki restaurant on the right. Neon signs in cyan and magenta illuminate the corridor, while a white sedan passes by on the street. The camera moves steadily forward toward an overpass visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway overpass with dense commercial signage

events.description: pedestrian in bright blue jacket walks past the camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the street narrows approaching the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing bright blue jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: circular neon sign with 'KIROSHI' and Japanese text 'オプティカル'
vertical purple neon sign with 'TENGU' lettering
small green food vendor stall with illuminated display on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the commercial district, the Kiroshi Optical sign becomes visible on the left while the TENGU sign glows purple on the right. A pedestrian in a blue jacket passes by on the left. The overpass looms closer ahead, gradually blocking more of the sky as the camera approaches the underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering the shadow of the overpass causes ambient light to drop significantly

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker corridor under the concrete overpass

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with trash visible on the sidewalk
floating holographic advertisements visible in the distance under the overpass
massive concrete support beams and roadway structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowy underpass beneath the elevated highway, where the ambient light drops significantly and the concrete structure dominates overhead. A green dumpster sits on the left sidewalk while holographic advertisements glow in the distance ahead. The enclosed space creates a more claustrophobic atmosphere compared to the open street behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridor into the oppressive shadows of an urban underpass. It begins on a rain-slicked street, passing the brightly lit Fuyutsuki restaurant as cyan and magenta signs reflect off the pavement and a white sedan glides by. As the camera moves deeper into the district, the glow of Kiroshi Optical and TENGU signs frames the path while a pedestrian in a blue jacket passes on the left. The scene then shifts as the looming concrete of an elevated highway gradually blocks the sky, drawing the camera into a darker, more claustrophobic environment. Finally, the light drops significantly upon entering the underpass, where a green dumpster sits on the sidewalk and distant holographic advertisements flicker beneath the heavy overhead structure.
